title: Jackie's Economy Mod
description: A Mod Adding Economy Supporting Items and Blocks! Always gonna have the future of economy!
body:
Jackie's Economy Mod

Jackie's Economy Mod brings a dynamic and immersive economic system to Minecraft, allowing players to manage resources, trade, and build efficiently.

# Additions

Adds blocks such as the Creative Display Table and Display Table, enhancing both creative and survival gameplay.

# Display Tables

The regular display table allows for 9 stacks of stock for any item or block, perfect for setting up market stalls.

The Creative Display Table has an infinite supply of any item, but once chosen, cannot be changed and also has no prices at all. This makes it ideal for creative mode showcases.

# INSTANT BUILDS

There are instant build blocks that quickly construct essential buildings. The Insta Bank and Insta Shop instantly create fully-functional bank and shop structures.

# Economy

The Income Block generates income over time, providing players with a steady stream of currency.

The EconomyBlock acts as a generator, summoning coins at regular intervals.

The Income Key is an unused data item for potential future updates.
